zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Sutton於大約1317年出生在英國艾可維文時，她的父親Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness48歲，母親Constance Sampson45歲。她於1339年與Sir John de Walton在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Sutton于大约1317年出生在英国艾可維文时，她的父亲Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness48岁，母亲Constance Sampson45岁。她于1339年与Sir John de Walton在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Sutton was born about 1317, in Wivenhoe, Essex, England, her father, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, was 48 and her mother, Constance Sampson, was 45. She married Sir John de Walton in 1339, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1391, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Sutton est née environ 1317, à Wivenhoe, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Constance Sampson, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Walton en 1339, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1391, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Sutton um 1317 in Wivenhoe, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness 48 und ihre Mutter Constance Sampson 45. Sie hat 1339 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Walton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1391 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Sutton è nata il circa 1317 nel Wivenhoe, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Constance Sampson, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Walton nel 1339, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1391, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Suttonが約1317年にイギリスエセックスウィベンhオで生まれた時，父Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holdernessは48歳，母Constance Sampsonは45歳であった。1339年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでSir John de Waltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Sutton(이)가 대략 1317년 영국 에세스 위븐호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance Sampson(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Sir John de Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Sutton nasceu aproximadamente 1317, em Wivenhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Constance Sampson, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Walton em 1339, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1391, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Sutton родилась около 1317 г. в местности вивено, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Sampson, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Walton в 1339 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1391 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Sutton nació aproximadamente 1317, en Wivenhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Sutton 1st Lord Sutton of Holderness, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Constance Sampson, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Sir John de Walton en 1339, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1391, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
